overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a narrow forest trail at night, bordered by a large rock cliff on the right and dense coniferous trees on the left. The footage appears to be from a survival or exploration video game with atmospheric low-light rendering and naturalistic textures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail between rock cliff and woodland

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow dirt trail between the rock wall and forest, navigating the uneven terrain in darkness

entered.detail: large textured rock wall with patches of moss and ferns growing in crevices
tall pine trees forming a dense dark forest boundary
green ferns growing out of the rock face on the right side
narrow unpaved path winding between the rock and trees

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail at night, squeezed between a massive rock cliff on the right and a dense coniferous forest on the left. The scene is dimly lit with low visibility, highlighting the textures of the rock face and the occasional ferns growing from its crevices. No other entities are present in this isolated natural corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic natural corridor at night. It begins by advancing steadily along a narrow dirt trail, squeezed between the imposing presence of a massive rock cliff and a dense coniferous forest. As the camera pushes deeper into the isolation, the dim lighting emphasizes the rough textures of the stone face and the small ferns clinging to its crevices. The scene maintains this oppressive atmosphere of low visibility, gliding further into the dark wilderness without encounter.
